recovery_architecture.civil_overrun_summary: 5 activities, 243 total days overrun, 103-day finish variance

stage1.title: Stage 1 - Downstream Civil Compression
stage1.summary: Three downstream civil activities re-planned, embedding 85 days of recovery into the sequence. Net delay entering compressor installation reduced to 7 days.

stage2.title: Stage 2 - Compressor Chain Compression
stage2.summary: 10 sequential activities tightened 1-2 days each, generating a 13-day buffer that fully absorbs the 7-day net delay.
stage2.outcome: All downstream activities restored to baseline finish dates

critical_path_calibration.summary: The Longest Path is compromised with early-completed noise while missing true zero-float drivers. Recalibration from 102 to 35 activities restores precision.

risk_register.description: Foundation Check - 7-day unrecovered slip from 24 Mar 2026
Compressor and Shelter Foundation - zero float, off Longest Path
Mechanical Construction chain - zero float, absent from CP radar
Pre-Commissioning chains - zero float, omitted from monitoring
Activities on CP finishing 1-206 days early consuming management bandwidth
Vendor attendance delays could consume downstream compression buffer

active_mitigation.title: C1000 Residual Risk - Mitigation Lever
active_mitigation.detail: Apply one additional working shift per week during C1000 Foundation Check and C1002 Baseplate Setting. Spread across the 39-day planned duration, this recovers 5-7 days before downstream buffer is consumed.

forward_operating_mandate.title: Lock the 35-Activity Path
forward_operating_mandate.description: Adopt the corrected Critical Path immediately and discontinue the 102-activity model. All reviews must focus on the optimized chain until Mechanical Completion.

forward_operating_mandate.title: Protect the Compressions
forward_operating_mandate.description: Execute the 85-day civil compression and 13-day compressor chain compressions exactly as re-planned. Any slip directly threatens the 20 Jan 2027 date.

forward_operating_mandate.title: Activate C1000 Shift Extension
forward_operating_mandate.description: Mandate the +1 shift/week protocol for foundation check and baseplate setting activities to eliminate the final 7-day vulnerability.
